title: crotalaria onobrychis
intro: Crotalaria onobrychis, also known as needle bush or onobrychis weed, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, characterized by its needle-like leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria onobrychis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used internally to promote health and well-being, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity.
